subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath opened wide the portals of divine knowledge through the key of utterance, and hath caused to rain down from the heaven of proof the showers [3.5s]... ...upset the equilibrium of the world and revolutionized its ordered life
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی فتح باب العرفان بمفتاح البیان و انزل من سماء البرهان امطار
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @personal instructions, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @call to action
